name: Moonseeker
ability: Each night, choose a player: their vote counts negatively tomorrow & they know this.
firstNightReminder: The Moonseeker chooses a player. Wake the target. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Moonseeker tokens. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Moonseeker chooses a player. Wake the target. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Moonseeker tokens. :reminder:
